# Customer Request Template

- `Title:`
- `Tenant Context:` (customer, contract/SLA constraints if known)
- `Context/Origin:` (ticket, escalation, call notes, etc.)
- `Scope:`
- `Out of Scope:`
- `Assumptions:`
- `Dependencies:`
- `Description:`
- `Acceptance Criteria:` (prefer `Given/When/Then`)
- `Estimate:`
- `Priority:`
- `QA Evidence:`
- `Technical Notes:`
- `Source References:`
- `Readiness Verdict: Ready | Needs Refinement`
- `Failed Gates:` (required when `Needs Refinement`)
- `Missing Sources:` (required when grounding is incomplete)
